name: climate-twin
description: A local-first digital twin for extensible whole-home environmental telemetry.

scripts.build:packages: npm run build:contracts && npm run build:spatial-layers && npm run build:stugby-protocol
scripts.dev: npm run build:packages && concurrently -k -n api,web -c blue,green "npm run dev --workspace @climate-twin/api" "npm run dev --workspace @climate-twin/web"
scripts.dev:api: npm run build:packages && npm run dev --workspace @climate-twin/api
scripts.dev:web: npm run build:packages && npm run dev --workspace @climate-twin/web
scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm run build --workspace @climate-twin/api && npm run build --workspace @climate-twin/web
scripts.test: npm run build:packages && npm run test --workspaces --if-present && npm run test:setup && npm run test:data-safety && npm run test:live-migration && npm run test:cloudflare && npm run test:rpi-ota && npm run test:update-agent
scripts.test:coverage: npm run build:packages && npm run test:coverage --workspaces --if-present
scripts.sonar:gate: npm run test:coverage && npm run test:coverage:python && npm run sonar:scan
scripts.typecheck: npm run build:packages && npm run typecheck --workspaces --if-present
scripts.mcp: npm run build:packages && npm run mcp --workspace @climate-twin/api
